flashcards.question: Weathering
flashcards.answer: The physical or chemical breakdown of rock at or near Earth's surface

flashcards.question: Mechanical Weathering
flashcards.answer: Breaking rock into smaller pieces without changing its chemical composition

flashcards.question: Chemical Weathering
flashcards.answer: The alteration or dissolution of rock minerals through chemical reactions

flashcards.question: Frost Wedging
flashcards.answer: Water freezing in rock cracks, expanding ~9% and splitting the rock apart

flashcards.question: Carbonation
flashcards.answer: CO₂ dissolves in water to form carbonic acid, which dissolves carbonate minerals like limestone
